playbook.intent: Feature lives on staging → safe push to prod with rollback ready and post-deploy verified.
playbook.scope: Solo founder pushes to prod safely: CI green, smoke pass on staging, feature-flagged where risky, deploy script run, post-deploy health verified, rollback path proven. Exit artifact is healthy prod + verified rollback path.

success-criteria.criterion: Post-deploy health checks pass within 5 minutes

stage.name: Pre-flight
stage.intent: CI green + staging smoke + flag plan confirmed.
stage.decision-gate: Advance when all 3 checks pass. Refuse to deploy with red CI or untested staging.

stage.name: Deploy
stage.decision-gate: Advance when prod runs new version. Stay if deploy errors.

stage.name: Verify
stage.intent: Health checks + key flows + flag rollout.
stage.decision-gate: Advance when health green + flows work. Hot-rollback flag if any flow breaks.

stage.name: Rollback drill
stage.intent: Prove the rollback path works (test in staging post-deploy).
stage.decision-gate: Required output: rollback proven in staging this deploy. Without it, next incident is fatal.

extra.value: [Multi-region deployments — single-region only here, Blue-green orchestration — flag-based rollouts only]
[CI pipeline configured (cd-basics complete), Staging environment live, Monitoring + logging configured]
[Deploying without flag because 'it's a small change' — small changes break prod most often, Skipping rollback drill — first time you need it is the worst time to discover it doesn't work]
['Can I roll this back in under 5 minutes if I''m on a phone at 3am?', 'Did I actually walk the critical flows, or just check that the homepage loads?']

{human: faion get-content deploy-day-staging-to-prod --format md, agent: faion get-content deploy-day-staging-to-prod --format context, json: faion get-content deploy-day-staging-to-prod --format json}
[{version: 0.1.0, date: 2026-05-20, note: Initial draft for F-064 P1 solo SaaS builder persona}]
